title: SAIC Board of Directors Declares Cash Dividend
author: Science Applications International Corp.
description: Science Applications International Corp. (NASDAQ: SAIC) announced that its board of directors declared a cash dividend of $0.37 per share, payable on July 24, 2026 to stockholders of record on July 10, 2026. The company intends to continue paying quarterly dividends, subject to board approval each quarter based on earnings, financial condition, and capital requirements.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The declaration of a cash dividend of $0.37 per share demonstrates management confidence in the company's financial health and cash generation capabilities. The commitment to continue quarterly dividends signals stable operations and shareholder-friendly capital allocation policies, which is generally viewed positively by investors seeking income and capital appreciation.

title: Stock Market Today, April 28: BigBear.ai Rises on Heavy Volume Ahead of Earnings as AI Defense Stocks See Increased Trading Activity
author: Eric Trie
description: BigBear.ai (BBAI) surged 10.46% to $4.12 on heavy trading volume ahead of its fiscal Q1 earnings report, driven by increased investor interest in AI-focused defense stocks. The company's 64.9M share volume was 54% above its three-month average. However, the stock remains down 58% since its 2021 IPO, and future performance will depend on government contract awards and backlog conversion rather than the recent trading momentum.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: While the stock rose 10.46% on elevated volume, the article emphasizes that gains reflect sector-wide interest rather than company-specific catalysts. The long-term outlook remains uncertain and dependent on government contract wins and backlog conversion, with the stock down 58% since IPO.

title: SAIC Board of Directors Declares Cash Dividend
author: Globe Newswire
description: Science Applications International Corp. (NASDAQ: SAIC) announced that its board of directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.37 per share, payable on April 24, 2026 to stockholders of record on April 10, 2026. The company intends to continue paying dividends quarterly, subject to board approval each quarter based on earnings, financial condition, and capital requirements.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The declaration of a quarterly cash dividend of $0.37 per share demonstrates management confidence in the company's financial health and cash generation capabilities. Dividend payments are generally viewed positively by investors as they represent a return of capital and indicate stable, sustainable business operations. The commitment to continue quarterly dividends further reinforces financial stability.

title: SAIC Warns Procurement Delays, Weak Customer Wins To Impact Q4
author: Lekha Gupta
description: Science Applications International Corporation (SAIC) issued preliminary Q4 results and revised guidance, citing procurement delays and unfavorable customer award outcomes. The company lowered FY26 revenue guidance to ~$7.26 billion and now forecasts organic revenue decline in FY27 versus prior expectations of modest growth. Q4 revenue is expected at ~$1.745 billion with adjusted EPS of $2.30-$2.50. SAIC shares fell 12.10% following the announcement.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company issued downward revenue guidance for both FY26 and FY27, citing procurement delays and weak customer award outcomes. Organic revenue decline is now expected for FY27 instead of modest growth. Stock declined 12.10% on the announcement, reflecting investor disappointment with the weakened outlook.

title: Tameka Shepherd Joins DCS as Vice President of Security
author: Tameka Shepherd
description: DCS Corporation has appointed Tameka Shepherd as Vice President of Security, bringing extensive defense industrial security experience from her previous roles at SAIC, BAE Systems, and the Defense Counterintelligence and Security Agency (DCSA).

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned as a previous employer of Tameka Shepherd with no specific context
